channel.title: Gamedev on Dwight Spencer - 0x5DCBF78E3F9C3FE3
channel.description: Recent content in Gamedev on Dwight Spencer - 0x5DCBF78E3F9C3FE3

item.title: Rules, Types, and Glue: A Multi-Paradigm Architecture for Game Simulation
item.author: dwightaspencer@gmail.com (Dwight Spencer)
item.description: A technical evaluation of Prolog, ML-style types (Coalton), and Common Lisp as a layered architecture for game simulation engines.
